zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Agnes Derby於1567年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特多爾斯特時，她的父親Nicholas Derby22歲，母親Catherine Buckler19歲。她於大約1597年與Thomas Chipman在英國多瑟特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1637年在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Agnes Derby于1567年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特多爾斯特时，她的父亲Nicholas Derby22岁，母亲Catherine Buckler19岁。她于大约1597年与Thomas Chipman在英国多瑟特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1637年在她的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Derby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Darby
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Derby, the county seat of Derbyshire, but also from the much smaller place called West Derby in Lancashire. Both are named from Old Norse djúr ‘deer’ + bȳ ‘farm, settlement’. This form of the surname represents the pronunciation of both the placename and the surname.

Irish: adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Diarmada (or Mac Diarmada) ‘descendant (or ‘son’) of Diarmaid’, a personal name meaning ‘freeman’. See also Dermott , McDermott . Gaelic Ó Duibhdhiormaigh was sometimes reinterpreted as Ó Diarmada, and Darby could also be an Anglicized form of this name. The English surname is also established in Ireland, having been taken to County Leix in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Agnes Derby was born in 1567, in Dorchester, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Nicholas Derby, was 22 and her mother, Catherine Buckler, was 19. She married Thomas Chipman about 1597, in Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1637, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Agnes Derby est née en 1567, à Dorchester, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Derby, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Catherine Buckler, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Chipman environ 1597, à Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1637, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Agnes Derby 1567 in Dorchester, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Derby 22 und ihre Mutter Catherine Buckler 19. Sie hat um 1597 in Dorset, England Thomas Chipman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1637 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Agnes Derby è nata il nel 1567 nel Dorchester, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Nicholas Derby, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Catherine Buckler, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Chipman circa 1597, nel Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1637, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Agnes Derbyが1567年にイギリスイギリスドールセトドールチェスターで生まれた時，父Nicholas Derbyは22歳，母Catherine Bucklerは19歳であった。約1597年にイギリスドールセトでThomas Chipmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1637年に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Agnes Derby(이)가 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 도르체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Derby(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Buckler(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1597년 영국 도르세트에서 Thomas Chipman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1637년 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Chipman aproximadamente 1597, em Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Agnes Derby родилась в 1567 г. в местности дорчестир, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Nicholas Derby было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Buckler, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Chipman около 1597 г. в местности дорсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1637 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
